dslRule:
<!id: eclipse.api.emphasizeMatch.rename>
<!description: Renames the 'emphasizeMatch' method to 'getStyledDisplayString' in implementations of ICompletionProposalExtension7, following API clarification. This rule applies to method declarations that override the old method signature.>
<!severity: WARNING>
@java.lang.Override public org.eclipse.jface.viewers.StyledString emphasizeMatch(org.eclipse.jface.text.IDocument $document, int $offset, org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.java.BoldStylerProvider $boldStylerProvider)
=>
@java.lang.Override public org.eclipse.jface.viewers.StyledString getStyledDisplayString(org.eclipse.jface.text.IDocument $document, int $offset, org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.java.BoldStylerProvider $boldStylerProvider)
;;

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable
